title: Middle Eastern Lamb Toast
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make dish that combines the rich taste of lamb with the crunch of toast.
instructions: 2. In a small bowl, mix together spice blend and olive oil.
3. Add garlic to the bowl and mix well.
4. Add lamb slices to the bowl and coat with the spice mixture.
5. Place the lamb slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until lamb is cooked through.
7. Meanwhile, toast the bread until crispy.
8. Spread a layer of tzatziki sauce on each slice of toast.
9. Top each slice with a piece of lamb, some chopped parsley, and a sprinkle of spice blend.
